modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Scanner icon is greyed out in WebXtender.

full_description_text: 
I was trying to use the scanner. The icon is greyed out. I can't click it. This is in WebXtender.
